code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let trimmed = string.trim(s)
  match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(n)
    mut i = 1
    while i <= n
      let m3 = i % 3
      let m5 = i % 5
      if m3 == 0 and m5 == 0
        println("FizzBuzz")
      else if m3 == 0
        println("Fizz")
      else if m5 == 0
        println("Buzz")
      else
        println("#{i}")
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
when None
  ()
end
